title: Crafting Cursor Instructions for Cross-Platform Reading System
first_prompt: I'd like you to craft a set of instructions for Cursor (an AI programming assistant) specifically for this project, keeping in mind the technical specification and stack, based on the following exampl
summary: Irwin sought assistance in generating comprehensive AI programming instructions for a cross-platform reading system, initially referencing existing rulesets from the Cursor forum and X.com. The conversation progressed from crafting general configuration instructions to developing a specific, detailed prompt for the mobile application itself. The assistant ultimately proposed a "Reador Mobile App Development Prompt" designed for iOS/macOS, outlining core features like Vision framework integration for OCR, multi-region selection, and secure cloud sync to AppleTV.
